text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto has yet to show up to training, so I
decide to search for her.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-the energy from the cosmos gives you
p-positivity? And you say the results are
permanent?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I never knew a p-product so amazing could be
real! I'll take one please!

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Lady
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, so you would like to purchase the cosmic
wristband. Now, how will you be paying?
choice_data_list: Are you sure this does what you say?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gyah, Trainer?! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, ho, ho, ho! I must take my leave, for I have
now remembered my very tight and busy
schedule!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! But what about my cosmic wristband?!
choice_data_list:
You should be more concerned that it's your
training time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I completely forgot! I'm s-so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remind Meisho Doto to be more cognizant of
her training schedule.
